channel.title: robot.tv News
channel.description: Video-first robot news and robotics news from robot.tv covering humanoids, physical AI, quadrupeds, and deployment signals.

item.title: In Japan, the robot isn’t coming for your job; it’s filling the one nobody wants
item.description: TechCrunch is framing the update as a signal for robotics commercialization.

item.title: Is Chevron's Robotics Strategy the Future of Oilfields?
item.description: That matters because buyers care less about robot demos than about whether fleets can lower inspection costs, reduce...

item.title: 'Every Industrial Company Will Become A Robotics Company,' Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Says
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang predicts that every industrial company will become a robotics company, highlighting the growing importance of compute choices for model latency, on-robot autonomy, and deployment speed.

item.title: Gecko Robotics brings its AI to U.S. Navy ship repair in latest next-gen defense tech deal
item.description: CNBC is framing the update as a signal for robotics commercialization.

item.title: Qualcomm joins MassRobotics, to support startups with Dragonwing Robotics Hub
item.description: That matters because compute choices are becoming a gating factor for model latency, on-robot autonomy, and how...

item.title: Wi-Fi That Can Withstand a Nuclear Reactor
item.description: IEEE Spectrum is framing the update as a signal for robotics commercialization.

item.title: Learn to build warehouse robots people enjoy working with at the Robotics Summit
item.description: The Robotics Summit will feature a session on designing warehouse robots for positive human interaction. This focus on collaborative experience signals a shift in deployment priorities beyond pure automation.

item.title: The future of RealSense 3D vision with Chris Matthieu
item.description: Chris Matthieu discusses the strategic direction of Intel's RealSense 3D vision technology. The conversation focuses on its evolving role in robotics and spatial computing.

item.title: Video Friday: Digit Learns to Dance—Virtually Overnight
item.description: That matters because the market is shifting from concept demos toward proof that humanoids can hold up in real factory,...

item.title: Chinese Robot Pioneer UBTech Offers $18 Million for AI Scientist
item.description: UBTech Robotics is making a significant talent acquisition play, offering $18 million to recruit a top AI scientist. This move signals a direct investment in core autonomy capabilities for its humanoid platforms.

item.title: Sanctuary AI’s robotic hand demonstrates zero-shot in-hand manipulation
item.description: Sanctuary AI's robotic hand has achieved zero-shot in-hand manipulation, a significant step in dexterous autonomy. This capability allows the system to handle objects it has never explicitly trained on.

item.title: Gill Pratt Says Humanoid Robots’ Moment Is Finally Here
item.description: Toyota Research Institute CEO Gill Pratt asserts that the long-anticipated era of practical humanoid robots has arrived. His statement, reported by IEEE Spectrum, signals a pivotal shift from research to real-world application.

item.title: PickNik Robotics gives MoveIt Pro 9.0 enhanced perception-to-motion, teleop capabilities
item.description: PickNik Robotics has released MoveIt Pro 9.0, adding new perception-to-motion and teleoperation features. The update aims to streamline complex robotic workflows for developers and integrators.

item.title: Europe Vies to Be Humanoid Robot Leader in Global Tech Race
item.description: European nations are mobilizing public and private capital to establish a competitive humanoid robotics sector. This strategic push aims to reduce dependency on foreign technology and capture a significant share of the emerging global market.

item.title: China venture capital funding set to hit record in Q1 on state-led tech push
item.description: Chinese venture capital funding is projected to reach a record high in Q1 2026, driven by a state-led push into strategic technologies. This surge signals a significant capital influx into sectors prioritized by national policy.

item.title: Surgical robotics: Why motion architecture matters more than ever
item.description: Recent industry reporting is framing the update as a signal for robotics commercialization.

item.title: AGIBOT rolls out 10,000th humanoid robot
item.description: AGIBOT has produced its 10,000th humanoid robot, marking a significant manufacturing milestone. This volume signals a shift from prototype batches to scaled production.

item.title: Figure CEO speaks out on OpenAI split: 'We're going to be competitors'
item.description: Figure's CEO has publicly framed the company's split from OpenAI as a move toward direct competition. This clarifies the strategic landscape for humanoid robotics development.

item.title: Uber Eats delivery robots vandalised in Sheffield suburb
item.description: Uber Eats delivery robots were vandalized in a Sheffield suburb, according to the BBC. The incident highlights physical security challenges for sidewalk robotics operations.

item.title: Humanoid completes live HMND PoC with SAP and Martur Fompak
item.description: A humanoid robot has successfully completed a live proof-of-concept for a hybrid manufacturing and distribution task with SAP and Martur Fompak. The demonstration validates the robot's ability to execute a real-world logistics workflow.

item.title: Google partners with Agile Robots, growing its AI robotics footprint
item.description: Google has formed a partnership with robotics company Agile Robots. This move expands Google's strategic presence in AI-driven robotics.

item.title: Voyager, Icarus Robotics to test free-flying robot on space station
item.description: Voyager Space and Icarus Robotics will test a free-flying robot on the International Space Station. The demonstration aims to validate autonomous servicing capabilities in microgravity.

item.title: Amazon acquires 'approachable' humanoid maker Fauna Robotics
item.description: Amazon has acquired Fauna Robotics, a developer of humanoid robots described as 'approachable.' The deal signals a major strategic move into advanced, human-centric automation.

item.title: Meet Figure AI: The company behind the humanoid robot hosted by Melania Trump
item.description: Figure AI's humanoid robot was featured at an event hosted by Melania Trump, according to CNBC. The appearance signals a strategic move to gain visibility beyond traditional tech and industrial circles.

item.title: Agile Robots to deploy Google DeepMind foundation models on its humanoid
item.description: Agile Robots will integrate Google DeepMind's foundation models into its humanoid platform. This move signals a strategic shift toward leveraging advanced AI for real-world robotic control and reasoning.

item.title: Mind Robotics raises Series A to develop AI-driven industrial automation
item.description: Mind Robotics has secured a Series A round to advance its AI-driven industrial automation platform. The funding will support development and scaling of its core technology.

item.title: Inside Project Kobe: Amazon's plan to build Walmart-style supercenters powered by warehouse robots and AI
item.description: Amazon is developing large-format retail supercenters, internally codenamed Project Kobe, that integrate warehouse robotics and AI. This move signals a direct operational shift to compete with established big-box physical retail models.

item.title: US lawmakers to introduce bill to ban government use of Chinese robots
item.description: U.S. lawmakers are preparing legislation to prohibit federal agencies from using Chinese-made robots. The move directly targets government procurement and supply chains.

item.title: 3 robotics trends from NVIDIA GTC 2026
item.description: NVIDIA's 2026 GTC conference highlighted three key robotics trends. These developments signal where computational demands and investment are shifting for next-generation systems.

item.title: Lucid Bots raises $20M to keep up with demand for its window-washing drones
item.description: Lucid Bots has secured $20 million in new funding. The capital injection is aimed at scaling production to meet rising demand for its commercial window-cleaning drones.

item.title: Meet the machines: The latest generation of robots
item.description: On the latest generation of robots entering the market. The coverage highlights new hardware and software capabilities from emerging companies.

item.title: No arms, no legs, no problem: the robots taking over retail logistics
item.description: A new wave of wheeled, armless robots is automating material transport in warehouses and retail backrooms. These systems prioritize simple navigation and high-volume movement over complex manipulation.

item.title: Amazon acquires humanoid developer Fauna Robotics
item.description: Amazon has acquired Fauna Robotics, a developer specializing in humanoid systems. The move signals a strategic push into advanced automation for logistics and fulfillment.

item.title: Amazon just bought a startup making kid-size humanoid robots
item.description: Amazon has acquired a startup developing child-sized humanoid robots. The move signals a strategic push into a new form factor for potential logistics or consumer applications.

item.title: OpenAI is scrapping the Sora app to chase bigger AI goals
item.description: OpenAI has discontinued its Sora application, shifting focus to broader AI development. This move signals a strategic pivot away from a specific product to concentrate on core research and infrastructure.

item.title: TI partners with NVIDIA to accelerate robot deployments
item.description: Texas Instruments and NVIDIA have announced a partnership to accelerate robot deployment. The collaboration aims to streamline development and integration processes for robotics systems.

item.title: Agile Robots becomes the latest robotics company to partner with Google DeepMind
item.description: Agile Robots has entered a partnership with Google DeepMind. This collaboration signals a strategic move to integrate advanced AI research with commercial robotics hardware.

item.title: China's open-source dominance threatens US AI lead, US advisory body warns
item.description: A U.S. advisory body warns that China's lead in open-source AI development poses a direct challenge to American technological leadership. This shift could reshape the foundational tools available for robotics and automation globally.

item.title: Amazon acquires robotic doorstep delivery provider RIVR
item.description: Amazon has acquired RIVR, a startup specializing in robotic doorstep delivery. The move signals a direct push to automate the final, most complex segment of the logistics chain.

item.title: Building tomorrow: How Bedrock Robotics is changing the construction industry
item.description: Bedrock Robotics is a useful startup-execution story because it ties robotics ambition to a concrete industry workflow, where customer adoption depends on operating fit rather than broad platform hype.
